title: Reflex Positive/Negative
readyDescription:
Identify positive and negative words!
You have {{time}} seconds for each question.
readyStats: You have {{total}} questions with {{time}} seconds each!

questions.text: You didn’t score well in a test, but you want to motivate yourself for the next one. Which thought helps most?

options.text: I will always be bad at this subject
There is no point in trying again
Others are better, so I should stop
I can improve if I practice differently next time

questions.text: A friend posts their success online. What kind of reaction reflects a healthy mindset?

options.text: Feeling upset because they are ahead of you
Thinking they don’t deserve the success
Feeling inspired to work toward your own goals
Avoiding their posts completely

questions.text: You make a small mistake while presenting in class. Which inner response is most constructive?

options.text: Everyone must think I’m embarrassing
Mistakes help me learn how to do better
I should never speak in front of others again
I always ruin things

questions.text: Someone gives you helpful feedback on your online project. Which response shows a positive attitude?

options.text: Using the feedback to improve your work
Feeling offended and rejecting all advice
Assuming they want to criticize you
Stopping the project completely

questions.text: You are learning a new skill online and progress feels slow. Which thought supports emotional growth?

options.text: If I’m not fast, I must be bad at it
Others learn faster, so I should quit
Growth takes time and consistent effort
There’s no value in slow progress
